author: Bryan Hirsch
text: [claude] label: open -> in_progress:wip | Found and fixed root cause: postCheckoutBeadsSync() called getStore() which returned nil because hooks cmd is in noDbCommands list (skips DB init). Fix: added ensureStoreActive() call. All 5 manual tests pass.

author: Bryan Hirsch
text: [claude] label: in_progress:wip -> in_progress:review_needed | All 5 tests pass. Bug fix in hooks.go ready for review.

author: Bryan Hirsch
text: [claude] Refined requirement 4 (mismatch detection) per user feedback: now explicit about what MUST be gone after reset (issues, deps, labels, comments created after checkpoint) and what MUST survive (all pre-checkpoint data with correct fields). Added round-trip integrity check (reset backward then forward, verify no corruption/duplication). This is the highest-value test in the suite.

author: Bryan Hirsch
text: [claude] label: in_progress:wip -> in_progress:review_needed | 14 unit tests pass, 3 integration tests skip without Docker (will run in CI). Tests cover: readBeadsRefs (6 edge cases), nil store safety, math reference guard, hook arg filtering, rebase detection, reset correctness with round-trip integrity.

author: Bryan Hirsch
text: [claude] label: in_progress:wip -> in_progress:review_needed | Added Unreleased section to CHANGELOG.md with 3 Added entries (beads refs, post-checkout sync, rebase/stash safety) and 1 Fixed entry (store init bug).
